mapper.sql: id, activity_name, activity_introduce, start_time, end_time, activity_status, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into seckill_activity (id, activity_name, activity_introduce, start_time, end_time, activity_status, create_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{activityName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activityIntroduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{activityStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into seckill_activity
id,
activity_name,
activity_introduce,
start_time,
end_time,
activity_status,
create_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{activityName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{activityIntroduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{activityStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update seckill_activity
activity_name = #{activityName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
activity_introduce = #{activityIntroduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
activity_status = #{activityStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update seckill_activity set activity_name = #{activityName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, activity_introduce = #{activityIntroduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, activity_status = #{activityStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
